name: Qwen3-Max
tagline: First trillion-parameter Qwen flagship (over 1T params, ~36T training tokens); proprietary, API-only.
metaDescription: Qwen3-Max (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-09 — part of the Qwen-Max line. First trillion-parameter Qwen flagship (over 1T params, ~36T training tokens); propri…
overview: Qwen3-Max is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Max line. Released 2025-09. Alibaba's proprietary, API-only flagship — its largest and most capable text/reasoning model, accessible through Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.
What's notable in this version: First trillion-parameter Qwen flagship (over 1T params, ~36T training tokens); proprietary, API-only. A Qwen3-Max-Thinking reasoning variant followed.
